name: app-gc-vmix
description: APP GC Vmix para operação de leilões com integração vMix
author: Rafael Lauriano <rafas.lau@gmail.com>

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.build: npm run prepare:icons && npm run typecheck && electron-vite build
scripts.build:host: npm run prepare:icons && cross-env APP_MODE=HOST npm run typecheck && cross-env APP_MODE=HOST electron-vite build
scripts.build:remoto: npm run prepare:icons && cross-env APP_MODE=REMOTO npm run typecheck && cross-env APP_MODE=REMOTO electron-vite build
scripts.build:unpack: npm run build && npm run install-app-deps && electron-builder --dir
scripts.build:unpack:host: npm run prepare:srt-player:win && npm run build:host && npm run install-app-deps && cross-env APP_MODE=HOST electron-builder --dir --config electron-builder.host.yml
scripts.build:unpack:remoto: npm run prepare:srt-player:win && npm run build:remoto && npm run install-app-deps && cross-env APP_MODE=REMOTO electron-builder --dir --config electron-builder.remoto.yml
scripts.build:win: npm run build && npm run install-app-deps && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:win:host: npm run prepare:srt-player:win && npm run build:host && npm run install-app-deps && cross-env APP_MODE=HOST electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.host.yml
scripts.build:win:remoto: npm run prepare:srt-player:win && npm run build:remoto && npm run install-app-deps && cross-env APP_MODE=REMOTO electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.remoto.yml
scripts.build:win:all: npm run build:win:host && npm run build:win:remoto
scripts.build:mac: npm run build && npm run install-app-deps && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:linux: npm run build && npm run install-app-deps && electron-builder --linux
scripts.build:linux:host: npm run build:host && npm run install-app-deps && cross-env APP_MODE=HOST electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.host.yml
scripts.build:linux:remoto: npm run build:remoto && npm run install-app-deps && cross-env APP_MODE=REMOTO electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.remoto.yml
scripts.package:linux:portable:host: cross-env APP_MODE=HOST APP_DISABLE_BYTECODE=1 npm run typecheck && cross-env APP_MODE=HOST APP_DISABLE_BYTECODE=1 electron-vite build && bash ./scripts/package-linux-portable.sh HOST
scripts.package:linux:portable:remoto: cross-env APP_MODE=REMOTO APP_DISABLE_BYTECODE=1 npm run typecheck && cross-env APP_MODE=REMOTO APP_DISABLE_BYTECODE=1 electron-vite build && bash ./scripts/package-linux-portable.sh REMOTO
scripts.package:linux:portable:all: npm run package:linux:portable:host && npm run package:linux:portable:remoto
